summary: Digital Health Innovation Executive with 20+ years driving technology commercialization, AI deployment, and digital transformation across HealthTech, FinTech, and e-commerce in GCC and Egypt. Proven track record building and scaling enterprise innovation functions from the ground up, translating clinical and digital health research into deployed, revenue-generating solutions. Currently leading $50M digital transformation across 15-hospital Saudi German Health network, deploying 14 production AI agents in live clinical operations and driving partnerships with U.S. HealthTech leaders. Expert in health innovation ecosystem development, governance frameworks, regulatory compliance (JCI, HIMSS, MOH), and translating digital health innovations into scalable commercial platforms. MBA candidate at Paris ESLSCA Business School. Committed to advancing Dubai Health's ambition as a leading academic health innovation ecosystem delivering measurable economic and societal impact.

items: IP Strategy and Knowledge Asset Management
AI and LLM Deployment (14 production agents)

experience.title: PMO and Regional Engagement Lead
bullets: Leading digital health innovation commercialization across 15-hospital network in KSA, UAE, and Egypt, managing $50M technology transformation program with direct accountability to executive leadership

Deployed 14 production AI agents in live clinical operations, including AI-powered clinical decision support systems, predictive analytics, and digital health platforms, representing one of the largest live AI deployments in GCC healthcare

Established enterprise innovation governance framework managing cross-functional teams of 30 professionals, standardizing IP identification, evaluation, and deployment pipelines across digital health, EMR, and analytics initiatives

Built and led strategic partnerships with U.S. healthcare technology leaders (Health Catalyst, KLAS Research) for integration of cutting-edge AI, EMR, and analytics solutions, structuring collaboration agreements and technology deployment roadmaps

Managed translational development pipeline: identified clinical pain points, commissioned proof-of-concept builds, validated solutions against regulatory standards (JCI, HIMSS, MOH), and deployed to production at scale
Ensured JCI, HIMSS, and MOH regulatory compliance across all digital health initiatives, embedding governance frameworks for responsible AI and data asset management
Represented organization in regional health innovation networks and contributed to institutional financial planning for sustainable digital health portfolio growth

experience.title: Country Manager
bullets: Led commercialization strategy for Egypt's first comprehensive FinTech SuperApp, designing platform architecture integrating payments, banking, e-commerce, and lifestyle services
Structured strategic partnership agreements with financial institutions, regulators, and service providers to build a scalable commercial ecosystem
Defined IP strategy for proprietary platform architecture, payment algorithms, and data assets, ensuring protections aligned with local regulatory requirements
Secured proof-of-concept funding and negotiated technology deployment agreements with enterprise partners to advance platform toward full market launch

experience.title: Head of E-Commerce Product and IT Strategy
bullets: Led digital innovation strategy and e-commerce platform transformation for one of Egypt's largest consumer electronics retailers
Managed technology portfolio including software assets, digital platforms, and data infrastructure, aligning IT investments with commercial growth objectives
Drove cross-functional collaboration between product, IT, legal, and commercial teams to commercialize digital solutions at scale

experience.title: Product Development Manager
bullets: Led product innovation strategy during hypergrowth, contributing to platform scaling from 30,000 to 7 million daily orders across GCC markets (233x growth)
Managed intellectual asset development including proprietary algorithms, operational frameworks, and platform features, coordinating with Berlin HQ, GCC countries, and Egypt markets
Led Operations Excellence Committee, driving cross-functional innovation governance and delivering customer-centric platform features that enabled massive scale

experience.title: PMO Section Head
bullets: Built enterprise PMO from the ground up managing 300+ concurrent banking and payments technology projects across 8 countries (Egypt, UAE, Jordan, Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Mauritius, South Africa)
Recruited, trained, and led team of 16 Project Managers delivering portfolio across 300+ banking clients worldwide
Established governance model and KPI framework for portfolio performance reporting, IP management, and technology deployment standardization
Governed 14-month Salesforce enterprise implementation across 8 countries (170 users), delivering commercial platform covering CRM, service management, and client engagement

experience.title: Engagement Manager
bullets: Managed multi-sector consulting engagements including Mayo Clinic (healthcare business process optimization) and AT&T (service operations transformation)
Delivered strategic recommendations on technology commercialization, operational redesign, and innovation pipeline development for enterprise healthcare and technology clients

experience.title: Earlier Experience (2004-2013)
experience.company: BlueCloud, Intel Corporation, SySDSoft/Intel Mobile Communication, Various
bullets: Senior Project Manager, PMO at BlueCloud (2012-2013): IT infrastructure projects for Microsoft Egypt, Vodafone Egypt, Qatar Diar
Project Manager at Intel Corporation (2011-2012): LTE (4G) mobile technology deployment
Technical Leadership Roles (2004-2009): Software development leadership and technology delivery for European and regional clients

education.degree: MBA, Master in International Business Administration (MIBA)
